## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## How I tested

<!-- Commands run + result. TDD is the norm here: failing test first, then implement. -->

- [ ] `pnpm test` green (core + desktop)
- [ ] `pnpm build` clean
- [ ] If desktop UI changed: ran the Electron app and smoke-tested the affected screen

## Checklist

- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] No secrets/API keys committed (keys live in Settings, not the bundle)
- [ ] README / ROADMAP updated if behaviour or roadmap changed
